(define p3 (inter p1 p2))

(define p6 (union p5 (s #\a #\c #\d #\f #\h #\i #\j #\m #\o #\p)))

(define (I . sets) (fold (lambda (s acc) (lset-intersection eq? acc s)) (car sets) (cdr sets)))

(define A1 (U '(a b d e f g h i j k l m o p) (U '(e f h i k l n o) '(a i j n p))))
(define A2-inner (U (U '(c d e f g h i j k l m n o p) '(c e g h j k n p)) '(b c g h i j k l m o p)))
(define A2-meet (I '(e f g h i j k l m n p) '(a b c d e g m n o)))
(define A2 (I '(a b c d e f g h i k l p) (I A2-inner A2-meet)))
(define LEFT (I A1 A2))

(define R1 (I '(c o) (I '(m) '(b c d e g j n o p))))
(define R2a (I (U '(b) '(b e f h i k l m n o p))
               (U (I '(a b c d e f g h i j k l m o p) '(a h i j l o))
                  '(a b c d e g i j k m n o p))))
(define R2b-inner (I (U '(b e p) '(a b d e f h j l n o p)) '(a)))
(define R2b (I (U '(b c d e f g h l m n o p) R2b-inner)
               (U '(c h i l n) '(h))))
(define RIGHT (U R1 (U R2a R2b)))

(define RESULT (I LEFT RIGHT))
(display "LEFT: ") (display (sort LEFT (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b))))) (newline)
(display "RIGHT: ") (display (sort RIGHT (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b))))) (newline)

(define (uniq lst)
  (let loop ((l lst) (acc '()))
    (cond ((null? l) (reverse acc))
          ((member (car l) acc) (loop (cdr l) acc))
          (else (loop (cdr l) (cons (car l) acc))))))
(define (U a b) (uniq (append a b)))
(define (I a b) (uniq (filter (lambda (x) (member x b)) a)))
(define (srt s) (list-sort (lambda (x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y))) (uniq s)))

;; Define abbreviations using let* to build up
(define result
  (let* (
    ;; Top-level split: LHS ∩ RHS
    ;; LHS = (A ∪ B) ∩ C  where A={c,d,h,l,n}, B=big, C=(D∪E)
    (L1 (U '(c d h l n) '(a b c d e f g h i j k m o p)))
    ;; C = (D ∪ E) where D = {b,c,d,...} ∪ {d,h,i}, E = complex
    (D1 (U '(b c d e f g h i j k l m o p) '(d h i)))
    ;; E = ({c,h,i,j,n,p} ∪ ({c,d,e}∩{b,f})) ∩ F
    (E1 (U '(c h i j n p) (I '(c d e) '(b f))))
    ;; F = (G ∩ H) ∪ {a,b,d,f,i,j,k,l}
    (G1 (I (U '(b c f h i k l m n) '(a b c f g h j k l))
           (U '(a c e f h i j k m o p) '(a b c d e i j k l n o p))))
    (F1 (U G1 '(a b d f i j k l)))
    (E2 (I E1 F1))
    (C1 (U D1 E2))
    (LHS (I L1 C1))
    )
    (list 'L1 (srt L1) 'D1 (srt D1) 'E1 (srt E1) 'G1 (srt G1) 'F1 (srt F1) 'E2 (srt E2) 'C1 (srt C1) 'LHS (srt LHS))))
result

(sort LESS? LST) → list
  Form: procedure
  Return a list containing the elements of LST sorted according
  to the comparison procedure LESS?. The input list is not modified.
  Uses a stable merge sort: equal elements preserve their original
  order.
  Parameters:
    LESS? : procedure -- a two-argument comparison predicate
    LST : list
  Returns: list
  Category: lists
  Keywords: sort, order, merge sort, stable, list

(define (uniq lst)
  (let loop ((l lst) (acc '()))
    (cond ((null? l) (reverse acc))
          ((member (car l) acc) (loop (cdr l) acc))
          (else (loop (cdr l) (cons (car l) acc))))))

(define (i a b) (sort symbol<? (filter (lambda (x) (member x b)) a)))

(import (srfi 1))
(define (U . sets) (fold (lambda (s acc) (lset-union eq? acc s)) '() sets))
(define (I . sets) 
  (if (null? sets) '()
      (fold (lambda (s acc) (lset-intersection eq? acc s)) (car sets) (cdr sets))))
(define (sortset s) (sort s (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b)))))

;; Now build the expression. Let me define helpers to rewrite the big expression.
;; I'll replace ∩ with I, ∪ with U manually.

(define result
  (U
    (I '(a b c d e g i k l m n o p) '(b g m o)
       (I '(c d e f j k l m n o) (U '(c e h j k) '(b c f g h i m o p)))
       (I '(a g h n o p) '(a b c d e f g h j k l m n o p)))
    (I
      (U
        (U '(a b d e f h j k m n) '(e h i l))
        '(h k o)
        (I '(a b c d e g h j k l n o p)
           (U
             (I (U '(c d h i m)
                   (I (U '(a c o) '(a b c d g h i j k l m n o p))
                      '(a b c g h i j k l n o)))
                (I '(a c e h j k l m n o)
                   (U '(a c d e f g h i j k l m n o p) '(c e h k l m))))
             '(b c e f g h i j k l n o p)
             '(j k o)))
        (I
          (U '(a b d f g h i j k l m n o p) '(a b e f g h j l m n o p))
          (I
            (U (I '(c d e g i j k l m n o p) '(c g l p))
               (U '(a b c d f g k n o p) (I '(f i k l n o) '(d f g h i j m n))))
            (U '(b c g i j k m n) '(a b d h p))
            '(a b c d e f g h k m)))
        (U (I '(a d e f g h j k l) '(a c f g m)) '(k m o p) '(a b c d e f h i j k l m n o p)))
      (U '(p) '(a d e f g h i k p) '(g))))
)

(sortset result)

(sort LESS? LST) → list
  Form: procedure
  Return a list containing the elements of LST sorted according
  to the comparison procedure LESS?. The input list is not modified.
  Uses a stable merge sort: equal elements preserve their original

(define (set-union a b)
  (cond ((null? a) b)
        ((null? b) a)
        ((char<? (car a) (car b)) (cons (car a) (set-union (cdr a) b)))
        ((char>? (car a) (car b)) (cons (car b) (set-union a (cdr b))))
        (else (cons (car a) (set-union (cdr a) (cdr b))))))
(define (set-inter a b)
  (cond ((null? a) '())
        ((null? b) '())
        ((char<? (car a) (car b)) (set-inter (cdr a) b))
        ((char>? (car a) (car b)) (set-inter a (cdr b)))
        (else (cons (car a) (set-inter (cdr a) (cdr b))))))

(import (srfi 1))
(define (U . sets) (fold (lambda (s acc) (lset-union eq? acc s)) '() sets))
(define (I . sets) (fold (lambda (s acc) (lset-intersection eq? acc s)) (car sets) (cdr sets)))
(define (ss s) (sort (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b))) s))
(ss (U '(a b) '(b c)))

(define result
  (U
    (I
      (U
        (U '(a c d e f g h i j k l m n o p) '(e))
        (I '(c d f h i j p) '(a b c h i j m o)))
      (I
        (U
          (U (U '(a c d e f k m o p) '(h))
             (U '(l) (I (I '(b f h j m o p) '(c d e g j n)) (I '(g h i) '(d)))))
          (U
            (U '(a b c d g i j k l m n o p)
               (I '(a b f i k o p) (I '(a l n) (U '(a b d g h i k l m n o p) '(a b c d e f h i l n o p)))))
            (U '(a c d f g h i j l m o p) '(a b d f h i k m n p))))
        (U
          (I
            (I (I (I '(b d e f i j o) '(a b c d e g h j k l m n o p)) '(a b c h i j k m n o p))
               (U '(a b c d e h i j k m o p)
                  (I (U '(b e f g h j k l m n) '(c d h j))
                     (I (U (I '(n o) '(a c d e h m p)) '(c d f g i m n o)) '(a b d e g h i j m n o p)))))
            (U '(b c g h i k o p) '(f)))
          '())))
    ;; ... this is getting complex, let me rebuild more carefully
    '()))
result
